score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable — instructional content, not a performance

confidence_rationale: Video is clearly educational/promotional material featuring Dr. T Rajeshwari Reddy presenting gynecological sterilization procedures and concepts. Contains disclaimer slide, lecture format with anatomical diagrams, text overlays explaining concepts (fertilization, contraception types, sterilization timing/procedure), and closing credentials. No FLS trainer, instruments, or task performance visible. No foam appendages, endoloops, or timed surgical skill demonstration.
cannot_determine: Performance metrics — no task execution recorded

verbal_cues: Overview of laparoscopic tubal ligation as a sterilization procedure
Explanation of ideal timing for sterilization (post-delivery, intra-operative with C-section, interval tubectomy post-menses)
Discussion of sterilization procedure steps and port sites
Laparoscopic surgery details (average surgical time 10-12 minutes)
Discussion of advantages (bloodless surgery, day care, quick recovery, no catheterization, patient back to work next day, minimal impact on sexual/hormonal/menstrual function)

note: This video is a patient/educational presentation about laparoscopic sterilization procedures, not an FLS task skills training or performance video. No scoring applicable per classification rules.
